S.FORM: Gencumincoku Teribi(原住民族電視台, Taiwan Indigenous Television) hya ga teribi na Taywan.
S.PHON: ɣenʦ~ʨuminʦ~ʨoku teriβi(*******, taiwan in*iɣenous~ɕ tele*is~ɕion) ħja ɣa teriβi na tajwan.
S.FORM: Gencumincoku Teribi(原住民族電視台, Taiwan Indigenous Television) hya ga teribi na Taywan.
S.PHON: ɣenʦ~ʨuminʦ~ʨoku teriβi(*******, taiwan in*iɣenous~ɕ tele*is~ɕion) ħja ɣa teriβi na tajwan.
